records.source_focus_summary: Lemma lem.det.minors-diag: For a diagonal n×n matrix D with entries d_i, (a) det(sub_P^P D) = ∏_{i∈P} d_i for any subset P of [n]; (b) if P and Q are distinct subsets of [n] with |P|=|Q|, then det(sub_P^Q D)=0.
formalization_sketch: Statement: For n:ℕ, d: Fin n → R, let D := Matrix.diagonal d : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) R. Then (a) for any P : Finset (Fin n), det (sub[P,P] D) = ∏ i in P, d i; (b) for any P Q : Finset (Fin n), P ≠ Q → P.card = Q.card → det (sub[P,Q] D) = 0.

Proof plan: (a) sub[P,P] D is itself diagonal with entries d_i for i∈P, so its determinant is the product of those entries. (b) Since |P|=|Q| and P≠Q, there exists i∈P\Q; the row of sub[P,Q] D corresponding to that i is zero, hence determinant zero.

needed_local_context.why_needed: notation for submatrixOfFinset A U V, used in the statement
to construct the diagonal matrix D
determinant of a diagonal matrix equals product of diagonal entries

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Matrix.det_diagonal
candidate_mathlib_context.why_needed: to compute det of the diagonal submatrix in part (a)

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Matrix.diagonal_apply
candidate_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: diagonal v i j = if i=j then v i else 0
candidate_mathlib_context.why_needed: to reason about entries of D

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Finset.card_eq_iff_eq_empty_of_subset
candidate_mathlib_context.why_needed: to deduce existence of i∈P\Q from P≠Q and equal cardinalities

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Finset.exists_mem_not_mem_of_ne
candidate_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: s ≠ t → ∃ a, a ∈ s ∧ a ∉ t

proof_notes: Use submatrixOfFinset_apply to relate entries of sub[P,Q] D to D entries.
For part (b), after finding i∈P\Q, show that row i of sub[P,Q] D is zero because D i j = 0 for all j (since D is diagonal and i≠j for j∈Q).
The determinant of a matrix with a zero row is zero (Matrix.det_eq_zero_of_row_eq_zero).
uncertainties: Exact name of lemma that a matrix with a zero row has zero determinant: likely Matrix.det_eq_zero_of_row_eq_zero or similar.
Whether Finset.exists_mem_not_mem_of_ne is available in Mathlib; may need to use Finset.ssubset_iff_subset_ne and Finset.exists_mem_not_mem.

records.source_focus_summary: Lemma lem.sf.alternant-0: For α: Fin N → ℕ, (a) if α has two equal entries then a_α = 0; (b) if β is obtained from α by swapping two entries, then a_β = -a_α.
formalization_sketch: Statement: (a) If α i = α j for some i≠j, then alternant α = 0. (b) For any transposition τ = (i j), alternant (α ∘ τ) = - alternant α.

Proof plan: (a) The sum over permutations defining alternant pairs each σ with σ∘τ, where τ swaps the two equal indices; the two terms cancel because sign(σ∘τ) = -sign(σ) and xPow(α∘(σ∘τ)) = xPow(α∘σ) since α has equal entries at i,j. (b) Directly from the definition: alternant (α∘τ) = ∑_σ sign(σ) xPow(α∘τ∘σ) = ∑_σ sign(σ∘τ) xPow(α∘σ) = -∑_σ sign(σ) xPow(α∘σ) = -alternant α.

needed_local_context.name_or_snippet: alternant (α : Fin N → ℕ) : MvPolynomial (Fin N) R
xPow (α : Fin N → ℕ) : MvPolynomial (Fin N) R
needed_local_context.why_needed: the monomial x^α used in the definition of alternant
sign of a permutation, used in alternant definition

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Equiv.Perm.sign_mul
candidate_mathlib_context.expected_signature_or_shape: sign (σ * τ) = sign σ * sign τ

candidate_mathlib_context.name: Finset.sum_involution
candidate_mathlib_context.why_needed: to pair terms in the sum for part (a)

proof_notes: For part (a), use Finset.sum_involution with σ ↦ σ * Equiv.swap i j.
Need to show xPow (α ∘ (σ * swap i j)) = xPow (α ∘ σ) when α i = α j. This follows from xPow being invariant under permuting equal entries.
For part (b), reindex the sum by σ' = σ∘τ⁻¹.
The local definition of alternant uses Equiv.Perm.sign σ • xPow (α ∘ σ); note the scalar multiplication •.
uncertainties: Whether there is a lemma xPow_comp_perm that relates xPow (α ∘ σ) to xPow α under permutation; may need to unfold xPow definition.
Exact name of the lemma that sign(swap i j) = -1 when i≠j: likely Equiv.Perm.sign_swap.
